title: Discard errors from Shutdown in `system renumber`
body: Every other Podman command discards errors from Shutdown, which will error if containers are running. Mirror that behavior, just ignore the errors.

comments.body: The Pull all tags tests are hitting timeouts everywhere. I think there are too many tags on Alpine to grab.
